mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(rated_star), 0) FROM tb_rating_detail WHERE store_id = #{id}
SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(rated_star), 0) FROM tb_rating_detail WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
SELECT phone FROM tb_store_phone WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
SELECT DISTINCT A.id, A.name, A.updated_date AS updatedDate, A.created_date AS createdDate FROM tb_category A INNER JOIN tb_store_product_detail B ON A.id = B.category_id WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
SELECT id, name, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate FROM tb_category WHERE id = #{id}

INSERT INTO tb_store (id, distributor_account_id, name, description, created_date, updated_date, is_publish, is_active, banner_image, address, phone) VALUES (DEFAULT, #{currentUserId}, #{store.name}, #{store.description}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, true, DEFAULT, #{store.bannerImage}, #{store.address}, #{store.primaryPhone}) RETURNING id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive

SELECT id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store WHERE distributor_account_id = #{currentUserId}

SELECT id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive, phone AS primaryPhone FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = true

SELECT id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_store SET name = #{store.name}, description = #{store.description}, updated_date = NOW(), is_publish = #{store.isPublish}, banner_image = #{store.bannerImage}, address = #{store.address}, phone = #{store.primaryPhone} WHERE id = #{storeId} RETURNING id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive
DELETE FROM tb_store WHERE distributor_account_id = #{currentUserId} RETURNING 1
UPDATE tb_store SET is_publish = false, updated_date = now() WHERE distributor_account_id = #{currentUserId} RETURNING 1
UPDATE tb_store SET is_publish = true, updated_date = now() WHERE distributor_account_id = #{currentUserId} RETURNING 1
SELECT store_id FROM tb_bookmark WHERE retailer_account_id = #{currentUserId}
INSERT INTO tb_bookmark VALUES (DEFAULT, #{storeId}, #{currentUser}) RETURNING 1
DELETE FROM tb_bookmark WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND retailer_account_id = #{currentUser} RETURNING 1
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_bookmark WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND retailer_account_id = #{currentUserId})
SELECT count(DISTINCT store_id) FROM tb_bookmark WHERE retailer_account_id = #{retailerId}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_rating_detail WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND retailer_account_id = #{currentUserId})

INSERT INTO tb_rating_detail VALUES (DEFAULT, #{storeId}, #{currentUser}, #{request.ratedStar}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT) RETURNING id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, rated_star AS ratedStar, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, rated_star AS ratedStar, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate FROM tb_rating_detail WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND retailer_account_id = #{currentUser}

UPDATE tb_rating_detail SET rated_star = #{request.ratedStar}, updated_date = now() WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND retailer_account_id = #{currentUser} RETURNING id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, rated_star AS ratedStar, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate

SELECT td.id AS id, tp.name, td.qty, td.price, td.image, td.description, td.category_id, td.is_publish AS isPublish, td.created_date AS createdDate, td.updated_date AS updatedDate FROM tb_store_product_detail td INNER JOIN tb_product tp ON td.product_id = tp.id WHERE td.store_id = #{storeId} AND td.is_publish = true ORDER BY ${by} ASC

SELECT td.id AS id, tp.name, td.qty, td.price, td.image, td.description, td.category_id, td.is_publish AS isPublish, td.created_date AS createdDate, td.updated_date AS updatedDate FROM tb_store_product_detail td INNER JOIN tb_product tp ON td.product_id = tp.id WHERE td.store_id = #{storeId} AND td.is_publish = true ORDER BY ${by} DESC

SELECT td.id AS id, tp.name, td.qty, td.price, td.image, td.description, td.category_id, td.is_publish AS isPublish, td.created_date AS createdDate, td.updated_date AS updatedDate FROM tb_store_product_detail td INNER JOIN tb_product tp ON td.product_id = tp.id WHERE td.store_id = #{storeId} AND td.is_publish = true AND td.category_id = #{categoryId}

SELECT id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = true ORDER BY created_date ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive, phone AS primaryPhone FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = true ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = true

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, tb_store.created_date AS createdDate, tb_store.updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store FULL OUTER JOIN tb_bookmark tb ON tb_store.id = tb.store_id WHERE is_publish = TRUE ORDER BY (SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_bookmark WHERE tb.retailer_account_id = #{currentUser})) DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, tb_store.created_date AS createdDate, tb_store.updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND tb_store.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT store_id FROM tb_bookmark WHERE retailer_account_id = #{currentUser}) ORDER BY created_date ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, tb_store.created_date AS createdDate, tb_store.updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store FULL OUTER JOIN tb_bookmark tb ON tb_store.id = tb.store_id WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND name ILIKE '%${name}%' ORDER BY (SELECT count(rated_star) FROM tb_rating_detail) DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, tb_store.created_date AS createdDate, tb_store.updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive, (SELECT coalesce(avg(rated_star), 0) FROM tb_rating_detail WHERE store_id = tb_store.id) AS rating FROM tb_store FULL OUTER JOIN tb_bookmark tb ON tb_store.id = tb.store_id WHERE is_publish = TRUE GROUP BY tb_store.id ORDER BY rating ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, tb_store.created_date AS createdDate, tb_store.updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive, (SELECT coalesce(avg(rated_star), 0) FROM tb_rating_detail WHERE store_id = tb_store.id) AS rating FROM tb_store FULL OUTER JOIN tb_bookmark tb ON tb_store.id = tb.store_id WHERE is_publish = TRUE GROUP BY tb_store.id ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, tb_store.created_date AS createdDate, tb_store.updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store FULL OUTER JOIN tb_bookmark tb ON tb_store.id = tb.store_id WHERE is_publish = TRUE ORDER BY name ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, tb_store.created_date AS createdDate, tb_store.updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store FULL OUTER JOIN tb_bookmark tb ON tb_store.id = tb.store_id WHERE is_publish = TRUE ORDER BY name DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_category WHERE category_id IN (SELECT id FROM tb_category WHERE name ILIKE '%${name}%')) AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_category WHERE category_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT category_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = tb_store.id)) AND is_active = true ORDER BY ${by} ASC

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_category WHERE category_id IN (SELECT id FROM tb_category WHERE name ILIKE '%${name}%')) AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_category WHERE category_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT category_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = tb_store.id)) ORDER BY ${by} DESC

SELECT tb_store.id FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id IN (SELECT id FROM tb_product WHERE name ILIKE '%${name}%')) AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = tb_store.id)) ORDER BY ${by} ASC

SELECT tb_store.id FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id IN (SELECT id FROM tb_product WHERE name ILIKE '%${name}%')) AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = tb_store.id)) ORDER BY ${by} DESC

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id IN (SELECT id FROM tb_product WHERE name ILIKE '%${name}%')) AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = tb_store.id)) ORDER BY ${by} ASC

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id IN (SELECT id FROM tb_product WHERE name ILIKE '%${name}%')) AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = tb_store.id)) ORDER BY ${by} DESC

SELECT tb_store.id FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id IN (SELECT id FROM tb_product WHERE name ILIKE '%${name}%')) AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = tb_store.id)) ORDER BY ${by} ASC

SELECT tb_store.id FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id IN (SELECT id FROM tb_product WHERE name ILIKE '%${name}%')) AND id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = tb_store.id)) ORDER BY ${by} DESC

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, tb_store.created_date AS createdDate, tb_store.updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND name ILIKE '%${name}%' ORDER BY ${by} ASC

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, tb_store.created_date AS createdDate, tb_store.updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND name ILIKE '%${name}%' ORDER BY ${by} DESC
SELECT tb_store.id FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND name ILIKE '%${name}%' ORDER BY ${by} ASC
SELECT tb_store.id FROM tb_store WHERE is_publish = TRUE AND name ILIKE '%${name}%' ORDER BY ${by} DESC

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store WHERE id IN (${combinedList}) ORDER BY array_position('{${combinedList}}', id) ASC

SELECT tb_store.id AS id, name, address, banner_image AS bannerImage, tb_store.distributor_account_id AS distributorAccountId, description, phone AS primaryPhone, created_date AS createdDate, updated_date AS updatedDate, is_publish AS isPublish, is_active AS isActive FROM tb_store WHERE id IN (${combinedList}) ORDER BY array_position('{${combinedList}}', id) DESC
SELECT id FROM tb_store WHERE distributor_account_id = #{currentUserId}
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT 1 FROM tb_store WHERE distributor_account_id = #{currentUserId}), 0) AS isExist
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT name FROM tb_role WHERE name ILIKE #{name})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_store WHERE id = #{storeId} AND is_publish = true)
SELECT is_publish FROM tb_store WHERE distributor_account_id = #{currentUserId}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_store_category WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND category_id = #{categoryId})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_store INNER JOIN tb_store_phone tsp ON tb_store.id = tsp.store_id WHERE phone = #{primaryPhone} OR tsp.phone = #{primaryPhone})
SELECT banner_image FROM tb_store WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT banner_image FROM tb_store WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT name FROM tb_store WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT address FROM tb_store WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT phone FROM tb_store WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT email FROM tb_distributor_account WHERE id = (SELECT distributor_account_id FROM tb_store WHERE id = #{id})
SELECT store_id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id IN (SELECT store_id FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{orderId}) AND id IN (SELECT store_product_id FROM tb_order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId}) AND qty = 0
SELECT store_id FROM tb_order WHERE status_id = 8 AND id = #{id}
